details.aboutIntro: The JXUFE Digital & Smart Technology Association is affiliated with the School of Information Management & Mathematics, focusing on data science, artificial intelligence and project development, striving to build the most professional tech exchange platform on campus.
details.publicDeptDesc: Responsible for shaping and promoting the association's image, creating posters and promotional materials to let more people know about DSA.
details.orgDeptDesc: Plans and executes all exciting activities, including lectures, sharing sessions, competitions, and more to ensure every event runs smoothly.
details.studyDeptDesc: Deeply researches cutting-edge technologies, organizes tech sharing and training, and leads members to learn practical skills in Python, AI, Web development, and more.
details.contributorsText1: Thank you to all contributors for your tremendous support in launching this site!
details.contributorsText2: If you'd like to participate in maintaining and updating the site,

welcome.title: Welcome to the DSA Association!
welcome.text1: The recruitment group will be set up in the new academic year~
welcome.text2: We look forward to having you with us!
